title: Soccer Guantone Mobile
description: Take on Guantone the sassy goalkeeper and the Hungry Giant in this funny, fast-paced soccer adventure! Score penalties, avoid blocks, collect diamonds, and reach 12 goals to win the cup, +7000 points, and an epic celebration with balloons and donuts! A happy, silly, and thrilling game for kids, teens, and anyone who loves big laughs and crazy soccer fun!
instructions: Controls Mobile Version Essential Touch Controls Ball Movement Tap the Left Right buttons on the screen Shooting and Aim Tap the Shoot Button Your tap doesnt just shoot it locks the Auto Aim at that precise moment Victory is all about timing
